programme.desc: Finally, Professor Archimedes has completed the encryptor chip to help cure Motherboard.

programme.title: SciGirls: Escuadron Espacial/ Space Squad
programme.desc: The SciGirls use everyday science to accomplish extraordinary feats.

programme.title: Nova: Rise of the Mammals
programme.desc: Sixty-six million years ago, an asteroid wiped out the dinosaurs in a fiery global catastrophe. An amazing new trove of fossils reveals how mammals took over, ultimately evolving into the huge array of species -- including us -- that rule the Earth today.

programme.title: History Detectives: Cromwell Dixon, Bartlett Sketchbook, Duke Ellington Plates
programme.desc: Elyse Luray takes to the skies as she pilots an airplane in honour of Cromwell Dixon, one of the country's youngest barnstormers. Experts believe the images within 'Bartlett's Sketchbook' are illustrations of the first-ever U.S.-Mexican border survey.

programme.title: Ancient Skies: Gods and Monsters
programme.desc: Explore the origins of our relationship with the skies. Our ancestors used the sky to navigate and tell time, and gave religious significance to what they saw in it. Then, a revolution gave birth to modern science.

programme.title: Nova: Rise of the Mammals
programme.desc: Sixty-six million years ago, an asteroid wiped out the dinosaurs in a fiery global catastrophe. An amazing new trove of fossils reveals how mammals took over, ultimately evolving into the huge array of species -- including us -- that rule the Earth today.

programme.title: When Whales Walked: Journeys in Deep Time
programme.desc: They are the most iconic animals on Earth—whales and birds of prey, ferocious crocodiles and magnificent elephants. Travel millions of years into the past to unravel iconic animal’s ancient stories.

programme.title: The Greeks: The Good Strife
programme.desc: Watch as ancient Greeks strive for excellence, strife proves to be an inescapable certainty-and it's not long before the rising civilization and all that it promises will face its gravest tests.

programme.title: American Experience: Chasing the Moon
programme.desc: Experience the thrilling era of the space race, from its earliest days to the 1969 moon landing. A fascinating mix of scientific innovation, political calculation, media spectacle and personal drama, the series brings the Space Age to vivid life.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Obscene
programme.desc: When a young TV star is assaulted and raped, the evidence leads to a radio shock jock.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Nationwide Manhunt
programme.desc: Chicago P.D. detectives Lindsay and Dawson join the SVU in the hunt for two escaped murderers they helped to convict.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Star-Struck Victims
programme.desc: When a lack of evidence leads Barba to drop rape charges against a popular actor, Rollins takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Assaulting Reality
programme.desc: The producers of a reality dating series make Benson and the SVU part of the show when they investigate contestant’s claims that she was raped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pathological
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a case involving two students in special needs schools and Rollins discovers that one child's medical issues stem from a surprising source.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Service
programme.desc: The SVU must break through military red tape when a soldier is suspected of sexual assault.

programme.title: Modern Family: New Year's Eve
programme.desc: The family goes to a hotel in Palm Springs to celebrate New Year's, which turns out to be less than stellar. Everyone ends up doing their own thing, and Jay runs into Billy Dee Williams. Meanwhile at home, Haley and Alex watch over the kids.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fulgencio
programme.desc: Gloria's mom and sister make the voyage from Colombia with baby names and family baggage. No one feels that Phil is able to help with the kids' problems, but there may be a method to his madness.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Slight at the Opera
programme.desc: Cameron is putting on the school production of 'Phantom of the Opera,' but when their star falls ill, Manny pulls all the stops to land the lead, even if that means going against Luke.

programme.title: Modern Family: Heart Broken
programme.desc: A fun Valentine's Day romp between Phil and Claire's alter egos, Clive Bixby and Juliana, takes an unexpected turn that lands Claire in the hospital and with a diagnosis that she doesn't take lying down.

programme.title: Briarpatch: Game Theory and Mescaline
programme.desc: Jake and Allegra make the most of a bad situation while Singe gets creative and the Senator takes a meeting.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Docks
programme.desc: As Antonio's life is now in question, Voight and Platt open up about their pasts. Jin is caught while tinkering with Voight's computer and uses the only scapegoat possible to keep him in the clear.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Beautiful Friendship
programme.desc: Atwater is settling into his new gig on intelligence as Antonio is relegated to desk duty while recovering. Lindsay finally realizes she has no way out and confides in Voight for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Call It Macaroni
programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get My Cigarettes
programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Kiss-Kiss, Bye-Bye
programme.desc: A case in forensics becomes a case in the history of Las Vegas when a beautiful ex-showgirl hosts a party that results in the murder of one of her guests. The investigation points to Catherine's father, Sam Braun, as one of the prime suspects.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Unwritten Rule
programme.desc: Analyst Nell Jones joins the NCIS: LA team in the field when a former Navy officer’s girlfriend is kidnapped in exchange for Navy intelligence.

programme.title: NCIS: Recovery
programme.desc: The body of the NCIS facilities manager is found four months after the navy yard bombings, leading the team to investigate the cause of her mysterious death. Gibbs is most concerned about Abby's recurring nightmares since the bombing.

programme.title: NCIS: Phoenix
programme.desc: While on medical leave, Ducky orders the exhumation of a Navy commander's body from a case closed 12 years ago. Meanwhile, the NCIS team investigates the recent death of a Marine and wonder whether the two are somehow connected.

programme.title: NCIS: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: When a helicopter crew is adrift at sea and later discovered on shore, the NCIS team must determine the cause of the crash and locate the missing pilot.

programme.title: NCIS: The Namesake
programme.desc: A petty officer is gunned down in a billionaire's Ferrari and the investigation leads the team to discover a link to a man Gibbs was named after.

programme.title: NCIS: Shell Shock
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant who recently returned home from the Middle East is found dead from a brutal attack. Gibbs sees that the victim's friend, who is suffering from PTSD, has experience overseas that may provide a key link to the crime.

programme.title: NCIS: Shell Shock

programme.desc: When Eddie becomes lethargic and refuses to eat, Martin tries everything to perk him up. He hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of this depression.

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier's spontaneous gesture of sharing a table with two beautiful women leads them to a double date at a country cabin. Frasier then tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he's betraying Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: Niles' new apartment building doesn't allow cats or dogs, so Niles get a new cockatoo. However, his decision to throw a party to meet his new neighbours is ruined when the bird attaches itself to Niles' head.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead
programme.desc: Roz develops a reputation as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of at a retirement home dies on her. Meanwhile, Frasier ponders what effect his talk show has on people.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Turn
programme.desc: When Roz decides to audition for her own radio show, Frasier mistakenly tells his agent, Bebe, that he would be sad to see Roz go. Frasier is outraged when Bebe tells the station manager that Frasier would quit if Roz got her own show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Old Girlfriend
programme.desc: A fictitious old flame of Ricky's provides a nightmare for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Million-Dollar Idea
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel have visions of making a million dollars selling salad dressing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky Minds the Baby
programme.desc: Ricky is supposed to be baby-sitting Little Ricky but somehow he's not.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Charm School
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enrol in charm school to cope with their husband's interest in a woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 'Twas the Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: The girls each plan to spend Christmas with their families but a series of strange occurrences lead them to spend Christmas together in Miami.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters
programme.desc: As a birthday present for Sophia, Dorothy brings Sophia's sister over from Sicily.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Kaitlin Doubleday from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Love on Iceland' visits. Lisa Vanderpump and 'From Freezer to Table' authors Polly Conner and Rachel Tiemeyer also joins the show.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly are looking forward to their big day. After their overbooked wedding venue reserves the wrong date, they have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date
programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip
programme.desc: Michael feels left out as the rest of the office gossips about the summer interns. While Michael searches for the next juicy rumour to share, Andy struggles with heterosexuality.

programme.title: The Office: Dinner Party
programme.desc: Pam and Jim have run out of excuses and are forced to go to Jan and Michael's house for dinner. When Andy and Angela are also invited, Dwight's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Happy Ending
programme.desc: As David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, the family scrambles to make it right.

programme.title: The Office: Lotto
programme.desc: The warehouse guys win the lottery and quit, leaving the rest of the office to fantasize about what their lives would be like had they been the winners.

programme.title: The Office: Garden Party
programme.desc: Andy decides to throw a garden party to try and impress Robert California. Dwight does some research into the party and feels he is making it a very classy event.

programme.title: The Office: Doomsday
programme.desc: Dwight tries to help the office's efficiency by installing a Doomsday device that will get them all fired if they make too many mistakes.

programme.title: The Office: Pam's Replacement
programme.desc: Pregnant Pam recruits Dwight to prove that Jim finds the office's pretty new temp attractive. Meanwhile, Robert California shocks Andy, Darryl, and Kevin when he asks to join their band.

programme.title: The Office: Gettysburg
programme.desc: Andy takes the office on an inspiring trip to Gettysburg in order to motivate everyone.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 7, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Wieners Out

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: South Park: You're Getting Old

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: The Problem with a Poo
programme.desc: Mr. Hankey's offensive behaviour puts him in jeopardy of being fired as the director of the annual Christmas pageant. Meanwhile at South Park Elementary, Strong Woman and PC Principal face a whole new set of challenges in their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind
programme.desc: When tensions boil over between neighbours in small-town Florida, a local waitress and her family fall victim to a poisoning, and investigators must track down the mastermind behind one of the most cunning murder plots they’ve ever seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain vs. Captain
programme.desc: The Captains of Catch put each other on the spot with revealing questions as they face off for the first time over their failures, triumphs and most controversial moments; plus, a surprise announcement.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unfinished Business: Part 1
programme.desc: The captains return to Dutch Harbor days before the opening of king crab season. As they prepare their boats and their crews to battle the Bering Sea, they must also face each other to settle unfinished business from the past season.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unfinished Business: Part 2
programme.desc: The captains return to Dutch Harbor days before the opening of king crab season and they must face each other to settle unfinished business from the past season.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captains on the Brink
programme.desc: Facing unprecedented global competition on the Bering Sea, the Deadliest Catch captains strategize how to beat the Russians to market in the harshest conditions yet. Mike Rowe checks in on the captains in isolation during the global pandemic.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Coast Guard Heroes
programme.desc: A USCG swimmer, pilot and captain, along with Sig, Keith, Bill, Casey, Jake and Sean give an insider's look at the scariest Bering Sea rescues. Many lives are saved and sadly, a few aren't.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captains on the Brink
programme.desc: Facing unprecedented global competition on the Bering Sea, the Deadliest Catch captains strategize how to beat the Russians to market in the harshest conditions yet. Mike Rowe checks in on the captains in isolation during the global pandemic.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Born Into Chaos
programme.desc: Captain Sean turned tragedy into triumph, transforming the family business into an fishing empire, raising the bar for a new generation.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: The Bering Sea
programme.desc: The Bering Sea has already wrecked six boats in what may be the worst winter in 40 years. Tug Redeemer head out to rescue the latest vessel before the icy weather tears her apart.

programme.title: Deadly Seas: Gulf of Alaska
programme.desc: The Sea Barb fishing boat pushes men to their limits in an attempt to net $250,000. The weather forces a rival fishing boat to run and hide.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!

programme.desc: Chase and Savannah are ecstatic to embark on a family graduation trip to London, much to the chagrin of Todd, a creature of habit who's never left the country.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Just Me and the Girls
programme.desc: The guys are away and so it's 24 hours of just Ree Drummond and the girls. She's whipping up a blueberry crumb cake for breakfast while they play with the new puppies. For dinner its petite filets with wasabi cilantro cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything!
programme.desc: It's question time on the ranch and Ree is covering topics ranging from recipes and romance to fashion. Dishes include three meat, three bean, three chili chili and shrimp mango lettuce cups.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding 101
programme.desc: Ree cooks up three comforting make-ahead meals, including chicken cordon bleu casserole, and tex-mex tamale pie with a spicy beef filling.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: A Tale of Four Lunches
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's whipping up four legendary lunches, from crowd pleasers to solo pleasures. There's spicy chuck burgers piled high with onion rings, plus a mother-daughter lunchtime collaboration of sesame tofu salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is answering cookout questions from friends and Pawhuska locals. She shares a chicken fajita salad and cilantro lime dressing arranged on a board as a stunning centerpiece.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Feast
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Freezer!
programme.desc: Ree is stocking the freezer with breakfast, lunch, dinner and dessert. To start, there are crunchy French toast sticks followed by Tex Mex butternut squash soup for lunch and casserole royalty with king ranch chicken. For dessert are confetti cups.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Everything From Scratch
programme.desc: Making an entire meal from scratch is a challenge- now imagine doing it in only 30 minutes! Four chefs who specialize in scratch cooking take on two grueling rounds, making everything from the bottom up.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bacon Masters
programme.desc: The bacon masters are back at it again when Guy Fieri welcomes four of the best bacon chefs to Flavortown Market for a real test of hog love. First, Guy has them make their best bacon sandwich after shopping in little, piggy-themed carts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Resolution Royale
programme.desc: Four chefs arrive in Flavortown ready to prove that traditionally unhealthy dishes can be made healthier and even more delicious.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species. As he swims through the watery oasis, he strategically stalks the Marten’s water monitor in hopes of having a face-to-face encounter.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Dragons of the North
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture to Australia's northern territory to investigate the saltwater and freshwater crocodiles. While there, they reveal the difference between them, and hope to bring awareness to each species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Phantom of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote races to Australia in search of the Perentie monitor. After a grueling week, the team makes one final attempt to capture the lizard and builds a makeshift birds nest filled with fresh eggs, in hopes of capturing the Phantom of the Outback.

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Cabin in the Woods and Bigfoot Encounter
programme.desc: A night of terror ensues after a couple accepts an offer to stay in an abandoned cabin in the woods, and a man is stalked by an unknown creature.

programme.title: Haunting in the Heartland: Face of Evil
programme.desc: Steve travels to Hebron, Kentucky, to investigate an evil entity attacking a local woman in her home. He and his team uncover a strange chain of events surrounding the property, but the closer they get to answers, the more violent the spirit becomes.

programme.title: Haunting in the Heartland: The Binding
programme.desc: Steve travels to Atchison, Kansas, to investigate an angry presence terrorizing a brother and sister. The investigation leads him to one of America's most-haunted homes and the realization that every part of the town has been touched by the paranormal.

programme.title: Haunting in the Heartland: The Watchman
programme.desc: Steve Shippy is called to the village of Merrill, Michigan, to investigate an evil entity tormenting a young girl. With the help of a local historian, Steve discovers the town's long-forgotten traumatic past and its connection to the girl's home.

programme.title: Haunting in the Heartland: I Am Red Death
programme.desc: Steve heads to Greeneville, Tennessee, where a decades-long haunting has resulted in an unspeakable tragedy. With the help of local law enforcement, he uncovers the Bible Belt town's dark past and its connection to the victim's family.

programme.title: Haunting in the Heartland: Descent Into Madness
programme.desc: Steve travels to Holly Springs, Mississippi, where a family is being tormented by the ghost of a psychiatric patient. He uncovers a dark secret that has haunted the town for over a century, and it may be the key to putting the spirit to rest.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Just the T.I.P.

programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Danger: Stop a Speeding Bullet
programme.desc: Risking it all in the name of physics, Todd Sampson goes up against one of the world's deadliest weapons. Facing an AK-47 rifle underwater, he must trust the extraordinary power of resistance in the water to stop the bullet before it hits him.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Danger: Death Jump
programme.desc: Todd Sampson takes a deadly leap of faith. In a dangerous bungee jump, his life depends on the strength of two phone books whose individual pages are weaved together that tether Todd to the bungee cord.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Psych: Very Important Sheeple
programme.desc: Discover the hilarious psychology behind pranks and practical jokes. Find out what happens when people are scared into fight or flight, offered unusual VIP services and more.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Psych: Flash Mob Freak-Out
programme.desc: Find out how people react when a stranger pops a kid's balloon or pops them the question.

programme.title: Street Science: Superpowered Glue
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts reveal the magic of one of the strongest glues on earth. They find out if just a few drops can keep a bungee jumper safe, and if it can lift thousands of pounds.

programme.title: Street Science: Car Chaos
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts use cutting-edge experiments to investigate the hidden dangers of a car crash, and if everyday objects can stop an arrow fired from a high-powered crossbow.

programme.title: Street Science: Dead Drop Danger
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts test the laws of gravity in a series of wild, Galileo-inspired experiments.

programme.title: Street Science: Hollywood Explosions
programme.desc: Kevin and his team of experts investigate the explosive power of gasoline. Using cutting-edge science experiments, they find if a tank of gas really explodes like it does in the movies and what it takes to make a Hollywood-style fireball.

programme.title: Mega Shippers: Billion-Dollar Superbuild
programme.desc: A nearly $2-billion bridge is being built, and mega shippers need to lift massive sections of the bridge 180 feet above a dangerous river. In Florida, $150 million-worth of yachts need to be moved without a scratch.

programme.title: Mega Shippers: Grand Ship Auto
programme.desc: Shipping from England to Baltimore, $34 million-worth of vehicles are to waiting to be moved across the Atlantic, but their ride is running late. In New Jersey, a multimillion-dollar convoy of nuclear reactor parts presents unique challenges to the crew.

programme.title: Mega Shippers: Championship Cargo
programme.desc: A brand new $33 million helicopter has just come off the production line. But getting it across the Atlantic in pristine condition is no small feat. Meanwhile, a championship rally car needs to be moved across five countries and two seas in just 76 hours.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Titanic: Conspiracy of Failure
programme.desc: New evidence is revealing fresh twists to the fatal chain-of-events that caused the Titanic to sink, and using cutting-edge technology and the latest scientific methods, experts investigate the secret history of its infamous sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Stirring Up the Dead
programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?
programme.desc: A cheerleader vanished from Blanchester in 1996 and her boyfriend was convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: United We Stand
programme.desc: On the fourth of July in New Orleans, the heat seems to trigger havoc in the streets. Holly, Nick and Keeley arrive at a bloody scene where a woman could lose her arm after a bar fight. Then, a first responder is assaulted at the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: World famous prosecutor, Marcia Clark, investigates the bone chilling, unresolved death of toddler Caylee Anthony to see if the beautiful little girl was murdered by her own mother.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Miss Brown Sugar
programme.desc: When 21-year-old Erica Vassell disappears after a Super Bowl party in Clewiston, Florida, the town launches an immediate search. But when her brutally murdered body is discovered days later, everyone in the tiny glades town is left in shock and fear.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Witnesses
programme.desc: When two young ladies don't return home after a run to the local drive-thru, their concerned parents immediately set out on a search to find them. However it will be a fisherman that will give police their first clue that something evil has happened.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Game Over
programme.desc: In 1994, high school coach Mike Bernos was found dead in a recliner, his body riddled with 15 bullets. His adopted son, Daniel Blan, was convicted of the murder. Now Daniel's wife and childhood friend are fighting for his freedom.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Game Over
programme.desc: In 1994, high school coach Mike Bernos was found dead in a recliner, his body riddled with 15 bullets. His adopted son, Daniel Blan, was convicted of the murder. Now Daniel's wife and childhood friend are fighting for his freedom.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control
programme.desc: When Sherri Dally mysteriously vanishes from her Ventura home, her husband Michael and best friend Debbie head up a massive search. But someone knows more than they're saying. Never-before-aired home videos trace a tale of sordid secrets and double lives.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Darkness Before Don
programme.desc: The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina make a perfect backdrop--for murder. Pillars of the community are pulled into a nightmare when affairs, abuse and embezzlement lead to someone losing their head.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Fatal Fuse
programme.desc: Police find a homeowner dead in their driveway riddled with bullets. Although one of the victim's family members claims to have witnessed the brutal attack, the alleged chain of events raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Dragged to Hell
programme.desc: Amanda Storms watches her high school sweetheart transform from great stepdad to abusive husband. When he moves out, she's grateful for the help of her friend Andrew Shepherd - until a terrible night of violence changes everything.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watching Amy Lord
programme.desc: 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord is missing in South Boston. Police first find her burned car and then... her body. Incredible footage from five ATMs and outside her apartment building captures the exact moment she was taken by her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A husband and respected businessman vanishes after a meeting. Meanwhile a young mother doesn't come back from her job search. Cops can only rely on one witness-one that never lies-surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: Must Find Mickey
programme.desc: 21-year-old Mickey Shunick is missing after a night out. Her family is terrified and mobilizes the local community to help search for her. Police are unable to find any trace of the Louisiana student -- until they spot her on surveillance video...

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder by Design
programme.desc: Investigators are looking into the killing spree that ended the life of Gianni Versace in Miami 20 years ago.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s California Ranch Project
programme.desc: Brett is horrified when a local fire chief and his wife ask him to completely gut and restore their 1940s California Ranch. Brett sets out to show them they can have a kitchen with all the modern conveniences they desire.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch

programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bird's-Eye Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a massive double-pen barn in southern Indiana. While they work to save every log and barn board, Mark visits an incredible lodge built from a different barn they took down in nearby St. Meinrad.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Repurposing Every Beam From a Pennsylvania Bank Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a Pennsylvania Bank Barn in hopes of recovering the Long Beams and Huge Sleeper Logs that lay below. They are up against the weather, the machines malfunctioning and the weight of the logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fighting the Elements to Build a Well House, and Repairing a Damaged Log Home
programme.desc: Mark and the guys return to their roots in Asheville, North Carolina. They have one day to build a log well house in the driving rain. Once it's up, they have to repair a severely damaged log home nearby.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Coast to Coast Cookouts
programme.desc: Seattle chef Renee Erickson celebrates summer by smoking food in wine barrels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Feast
programme.desc: Chef Jason French prepares his food in a wood-fired oven and an outdoor smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Seafood Feast
programme.desc: Brothers Vaughn and Gary Knowles take Roger to the docks for fresh lobsters and clams for a breathtaking seafood feast. The Nisqually Tribe teaches Roger ways of preparing seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Outrageous Ovens
programme.desc: Mark Skudlarek fires his kiln to bake pottery and uses some of the coals for cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feasts Over Fire in Hawaii
programme.desc: Roger's first visit to the 50th state promises big fires and big feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South Carolina Surf and Turf
programme.desc: Roger leaves the city of Charleston and heads out into the country for some whole hog barbecue and low-country oyster roasts.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Fall Fair Pies
programme.desc: In the elimination round, the bakers compete against time while using thyme. The last two standing compete for $10,000 in a fall fair-themed pie showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Spring Cakes
programme.desc: Three bakers compete in an elimination round using beets, two make it to the spring-themed cake showdown, and one will walk away $10,000 richer.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Harvest Donuts
programme.desc: Three bakers compete in a speedy elimination round using cranberries. Then, the two finalists compete for $10,000 in a harvest-themed donut showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Into the Woods Cakes
programme.desc: Three bakers compete in a speedy elimination round using maple syrup as their mystery ingredient. The last two standing compete for $10,000 in an into the woods-themed cake showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: It's a Small World Pies
programme.desc: Bakers compete in a speedy elimination round with mini marshmallows as the mystery ingredient.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Kids Hide-and-Seek Cupcakes
programme.desc: Talented kid bakers compete in a speedy elimination round with pink peppercorns as the mystery ingredient. The last two standing compete for $10,000 in a special hide-and-seek-themed kids cupcake showdown.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Flower Power
programme.desc: Vanessa and Tim are trying to find a cake that suits both their tastes. Vanessa wants a garden-themed, Savannah-inspired showpiece, while Tim wants something that tells the story of their romance without femininity.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Sisters Treava and Raya rarely agree on much, but they both know that their 25th annual family reunion has got to be the greatest the Hopkins family has ever seen, but they can't agree on the perfect cake for the occasion.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Cake For Everyman
programme.desc: 25 years of blood, sweat and tears has paid off for Vinny, founder of the Everyman Theater. Together with the theater's manager, Jon, the two are planning a blowout 25th anniversary party to kick off their new season.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Tiers of Beers
programme.desc: Grace is a Southern belle with a high fashion sense engaged to Jeremy, a down-home Georgia boy. With so much to plan, the cake seems to be the largest of their worries. Grace wants an over-the-top cake with a dazzling amount of sparkle.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a fantasy league of snacks. Clear off the coffee table for Home Run Inn's Meat Lovers Pizza and the cheese and caramel popcorn mix from Garrett's in Chicago.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center
programme.desc: Join host Alfonso Ribeiro as he explores foods with secret centers. From the gooey middle of the Mallo Cup to the creamy goodness of a peppermint cream or the surprisingly complex filling in a Mini Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Chops
programme.desc: Alton yearns for the juicy chop of yesterday and he intends to get it with his Stuffed Grilled Pork Chops. Alton pays a visit the neighborhood butcher, picks up stuffing tips and shares more than you ever wanted to know about propane.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dip Madness
programme.desc: Onion dip from scratch; hot spinach and artichoke dip; guacamole; California dip.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: Forget about standard spicy seasonings. Eddie Jackson rounds up dishes made with the hottest, zippiest and peppiest peppers out there.

programme.desc: Michael Symon, Sunny Anderson and Alton Brown discuss dishes that were unexpectedly good.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Simply Irresistible
programme.desc: Find out what various chefs have to say about roasted chicken, sticky buns, and seafood.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Clash on Mystery Mountain/ A Teeny Weeny Problem
programme.desc: Night Ninja tricks Armadylan into stealing An Yu's bo staff.

programme.desc: Night Ninja kidnaps the kids' teacher; the PJs try to fix a damaged Robot.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Golden Boo-Boo

programme.title: Muppet Babies: How Kermit Got His Groove/ One Small Problem
programme.desc: When Rizzo the Rat arrives and makes a mess in the playroom, the only way the Muppet Babies can get him to stop is to defeat him in a dance-off. Summer is tired of being the smallest Muppet Baby and enlists Dr. Bunsen Honeydew and Beaker to help.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Run Fozzie Run/My Brother Vinny
programme.desc: Fozzie runs away after he accidentally breaks the swing. Rizzo is feeling a little insecure when his superstar singer big brother arrives at the playroom for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop Lazlo!/ The Hot Diggity Dog Show

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars
programme.desc: The story is set a couple summers ago in a galaxy far, far away when Phineas, Ferb and the gang are in a parallel universe during Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope. Phineas and Ferb are living just one moisture farm over from Luke.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Last Day of Summer

programme.title: Movie: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: The prequel to the Hollywood classic, Planet of the Apes, begins in San Francisco when man's attempts to push the boundaries of science results in the rise of genetically modified apes who threaten to take over the world.

programme.title: Movie: The Kitchen
programme.desc: A group of gangsters are locked up their wives continue the running of their illicit enterprises in 1970s Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: Blinded by the Light
programme.desc: A teenager learns to live his life and find his voice through the music of Bruce Springsteen.

programme.title: Westworld: The Mother of Exiles
programme.desc: A dark odyssey about the dawn of artificial consciousness and the evolution of sin.

programme.title: Atlanta's Missing and Murdered: The Lost Children
programme.desc: Examine the details of the abduction and murder of black children from 1979-1981.

programme.title: The Plot Against America
programme.desc: Evelyn makes Sandy the face of the 'Just Folks' program, despite Bess' and Herman's objections. A war casualty, Alvin takes a menial job and tries to regroup.

programme.title: Movie: The Scheme
programme.desc: Learn about a criminal enterprise that infiltrated college basketball teams and funneled hundreds of thousands of dollars to steer recruits to prominent athletic programs, and led to the arrest of Adidas executives and assistant coaches at colleges.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Soup
programme.desc: When a snowstorm hits on Christmas eve, Pam-Anne joins her sister Destiny and a motley crew of flight attendants at their usual crash pad in Queens. The Guy celebrates Hanukkah in New York.

programme.title: Movie: The Nice Guys
programme.desc: In 1970s Los Angeles, private eye Holland March is forced to work with a hired enforcer to solve the case of a missing girl and the apparent suicide of a porn star. As their investigation progresses, they uncover the roots of a large conspiracy.

programme.title: Movie: Salinger
programme.desc: Look into the life of author J.D. Salinger.

programme.title: Movie: Eragon
programme.desc: A boy named Eragon finds a polished blue stone in the forest that hatches into a dragon. Eragon is soon thrust into a world of magic and power through which he and the dragon must navigate in order to save his home against an evil king.

programme.title: Movie: The Lovely Bones
programme.desc: From the afterlife, a young girl tells the story of her family as they attempt to restore normalcy in their lives after her murder. She weighs her desire for her family to heal against her urge for vengeance.

programme.title: The Making of: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit
programme.desc: A mentor asks a talented young CIA trainee to help find a mole inside the agency.

programme.title: Movie: Unknown
programme.desc: After awakening from a coma, a man discovers that his identity has been stolen.

programme.title: Movie: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: A submarine captain on a rescue mission in the Arctic Ocean discovers that the Russian president has been kidnapped and that a coup is in progress. With the world teetering on the brink of WWIII, he must navigate enemy waters to rescue the President.

programme.title: Movie: Us
programme.desc: Evil doppelgangers terrorize a vacationing family.

programme.title: Movie: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: This documentary examines the rising phenomenon of 'fake news. in the U.S. and the impact that disinformation, conspiracy theories and false news stories have on the average citizen.

programme.title: Westworld: The Absence of Field
programme.desc: The Charlotte host discovers that the world's wealthiest man is striving to take over Delos with the help of a mole in the company.

programme.title: Westworld: The Mother of Exiles
programme.desc: A dark odyssey about the dawn of artificial consciousness and the evolution of sin.

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend: The Story of a New Name
programme.desc: Elena and Lila continue their journey into adulthood.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Movie: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: A government agent and a former assassin work together to stop a genetically enhanced villain who intends to unleash a supervirus.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Soup
programme.desc: When a snowstorm hits on Christmas eve, Pam-Anne joins her sister Destiny and a motley crew of flight attendants at their usual crash pad in Queens. The Guy celebrates Hanukkah in New York.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Movie: Armageddon
programme.desc: A drill rigger and his crew embark on a mission to blow up an asteroid heading for Earth.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own

programme.title: Psych: Nine Lives

programme.title: Psych: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Lassiter is in charge of the annual Civil War re-enactment, and Shawn knows that watching the meltdowns at the rehearsals are more fun than the actual show and so he and Gus, a history buff, show up to watch.

programme.title: Psych: Who Ya Gonna Call?
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus investigate a man's claim that a ghost is attempting to kill him, while Julia and Lassiter investigate a psychologist's murder.

programme.title: Psych: Shawn vs. the Red Phantom
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus sneak into a comic book convention posing as the assistants of the convention's featured guest, George Takei, to locate a missing teenager.

programme.title: Psych: Forget Me Not
programme.desc: Shawn investigates when a forgetful family friend claims to have solved an old murder case, which may be linked to a more recent killing.

programme.title: Psych: From the Earth to the Starbucks

programme.title: Psych: He Loves Me, He Loves Me Not, He Loves Me. Oops, He's Dead
programme.desc: As a joke, Lassiter gives Shawn the case when a man arrives naked at the police station claiming to have been abducted by aliens, but Shawn's investigation soon takes him into an even stranger universe, speed dating.

programme.title: Psych: Cloudy... Chance of Murder

programme.title: Psych: Game, Set... Muuurder?

programme.title: Psych: Poker? I Barely Know Her

programme.title: Psych: Scary Sherry: Bianca's Toast

programme.desc: Fast-talking petroleum tycoon tries to foist some phoney stock off on the Ricardos.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
