programme.desc: Generation after generation, families rely on Dr. Pol to keep their animals healthy.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Nutty Pol-fessor
programme.desc: With decades of experience, Dr. Pol really knows his stuff when it comes to animals.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Help Me, Help Moo
programme.desc: Dr. Pol will treat any animal, from wherever it comes and however it joined the family.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hooves of Hazard
programme.desc: On this episode of The Incredible Dr. Pol, animals are the masters of mischief!

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Under the Yukon Sun
programme.desc: Dr. Michelle Oakley battles the elements to take care of animals.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lindbergh Kidnapping
programme.desc: Christof investigates the Lindbergh kidnapping, a story that made his grandfather's journalism career. Now, using his grandfather's notes and recently declassified FBI files, Christof tracks down surprising new leads to Germany and even the Nazi Party.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Good Eats: Whole Latke Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown delves into the history of and techniques for this classic Hanukkah dish which, believe it or not, was originally made with a famous Italian cheese.

programme.title: Good Eats: Porterhouse Rules
programme.desc: Learn everything you need to know about porterhouses.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wild Yeast Risin'
programme.desc: First the pandemic, then the zombies, then the nukes and now: desolation and a giant dinosaur-thing. Luckily there is still yeast in the air, and Alton proves that with a wild sourdough in the kitchen along with cheese crackers and waffles.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Shakshuka
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a deep dive on one of the most internet-famous dishes of the decade by way of a famous film from the 1940s. Along the way, Alton talks through preserved lemons and homemade harissa.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat (Icebox) Cake
programme.desc: Alton resuscitates the languishing tradition of the 'icebox' or 'refrigerator' cake. These no-bake cakes were all the rage in the 1950s, but they’re ready for a pastry redux.

programme.title: Good Eats: Immersion Therapy
programme.desc: The last decade has seen a lot of change in the food world, but no device has made more of a difference than the immersion circulator. Alton Brown makes an argument for having one in every kitchen by featuring dishes such as a perfect rump roast.

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Good Eats: Date Tripper
programme.desc: Alton tells everything you need to know to get dates into your culinary life, including three recipes for the 1960s classic 'Devils on Horseback' and a very 'scrummy' sticky toffee pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce II
programme.desc: No matter how good of a cook you are, sooner or later your seafood is going to let you down. Alton Brown has the sauces that will save your dinner every time.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.desc: Learn how Wild West holsters, underwater video housings, soy beverages and pet nail trimmers are made.

programme.desc: See how cine cameras, glass Christmas ornaments, and giant tires are made.

programme.title: American Justice: A Deadly Dose
programme.desc: Viewers determine the guilt or innocence of Brian Eftenoff, who is accused of killing his wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: The Sober Truth
programme.desc: In Austin, Luddy and Finch practice parking lot medicine when they respond to a heroin overdose on a 19-year-old patient. Niki and Nicole show their compassionate side to a young woman suffering from an emotional trauma in Baton Rouge.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Trauma Drama
programme.desc: Brandon and Coop race to save a man's life after he was struck by a bullet in the chest. New Nightwatch Nation team Alyssa and Kasie are called to a special needs pediatric patient in Baton Rouge which reminds Alyssa of her own miracle baby at home.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Lost in the Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Keith Bergeron goes deep in the bayou to check out a report of someone burning trash, but finds himself outnumbered by several angry locals.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Gator Man's Law
programme.desc: Corporal Storm Fitch finds an abandoned car in the marsh just off an eerie and haunted bayou road.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Biker Thieves
programme.desc: An organized ring of motorcycle thieves has been striking every six months, stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of motorcycles in a single night.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Swamp Manhunt
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous fugitive from another parish tries to make his escape in the swamps.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Deputies work around the clock in Terrebonne Parish, which is home to the second biggest Mardi Gras in the state.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Geaux Speed Racers
programme.desc: The deputies are called in to bust teens illegally street racing in the bayou. Deputy Marlin Meeks is dispatched to a disturbance at an old house that is rumoured to be haunted.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Murder in Unit 14
programme.desc: An inmate collapses and dies from multiple stab wounds after an altercation inside the cellblock.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With inmate drug use at an all-time high, the Squad searches for the source of the drugs that have made their way into the prison.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Robert/ Montrell
programme.desc: A man suffering from bipolar disorder runs from the police; shots fired as man eludes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighbors on a Dead End
programme.desc: A disabled fireman appoints himself sheriff of his street, policing his neighbors and clamping down on violations ranging from loud music to off leash dogs. Things boil over at a birthday party where shots are fired and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The War Next Door
programme.desc: A family loves everything about their new home except the mockingbirds that perch and squawk in the backyard lemon tree. Their efforts to scare them off start a feud with their neighbors that spins out of control until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Who Was the Weepy-Voiced Killer?
programme.desc: After a man with a somber voice calls 911 to report his own murders, a police investigation unfolds to try and prevent others from falling victim to his hand.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Vanished in Virginia
programme.desc: Seventeen-year- Taylor Behl has only been away at college in Richmond, Virginia for two weeks when she goes missing without a trace. Her diaries point to several possible suspects in what eventually becomes an alarming homicide investigation.

programme.title: My Murder Story: Journey for Justice
programme.desc: On a deserted road in Arkansas, a man is gunned down in his car. As the case goes cold, the deceased man's daughter tries to track down the perpetrators of his murder until she finally gets a lead from another homicide thirteen years later.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Primal Instincts
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day and first-time mom Tennyson Jacobson is looking forward to celebrating with her family. But when she spends her daughter's naptime fighting off a violent intruder, Tennyson can't shake the feeling he'll soon be back to strike again.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Vanished in Virginia
programme.desc: Seventeen-year- Taylor Behl has only been away at college in Richmond, Virginia for two weeks when she goes missing without a trace. Her diaries point to several possible suspects in what eventually becomes an alarming homicide investigation.

programme.title: My Murder Story: Journey for Justice
programme.desc: On a deserted road in Arkansas, a man is gunned down in his car. As the case goes cold, the deceased man's daughter tries to track down the perpetrators of his murder until she finally gets a lead from another homicide thirteen years later.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Who Was the Weepy-Voiced Killer?
programme.desc: After a man with a somber voice calls 911 to report his own murders, a police investigation unfolds to try and prevent others from falling victim to his hand.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Daughter's Fight
programme.desc: A woman is murdered, and her daughter is certain she knows who is responsible. But can she prove it? After five years a cold case turns hot, and investigators discover the suspect a pillar of the community is hiding secrets.

programme.title: Facing Evil: Gone Too Soon
programme.desc: Baby Dylan was 3 months old when his mother, Alexandra Tobias shook him to death. She claims it was an accident but was found guilty of second degree murder and sentenced to 50 years. Candice DeLong digs deeper to find out what made this young mom snap.

programme.title: Facing Evil: Death by Stiletto
programme.desc: A night ends in tragedy when Stefan Andersson is bludgeoned to death by girlfriend Ana Trujillo – and her five- inch stiletto heel. She claims self defense but a jury found her guilty of murder. Candice Delong wants to know what turned her into a killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: For unsuspecting victims, being too close to their enemies led to their demise.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Girl on Girl
programme.desc: They may be the fairer sex but when they clash it can be downright brutal. An abusive mother takes drastic steps to keep custody of her child; a small town gossip sparks a murderous grudge match; and a teen bully makes a shocking move.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dumped and Dangerous
programme.desc: When their love life goes sour these Deadly Women take lethal revenge. They are 'Dumped and Dangerous.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Malicious Hearts
programme.desc: Some women have ice running through their veins. They lack the instinct to care. A mom locks up and tortures her daughter like she's a prisoner-of-war; a helpful neighbor quietly kills her community; and lesbian lovers bash and burn a complete stranger.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Eternal Revenge
programme.desc: When a virtuous woman is seduced, a lover betrayed, and an 'old' wife replaced by a 'new' one, the lives of the men who caused the hurt are destroyed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: When these women exposed their true selves, their men found out they'd been 'Sleeping With The Enemy.' A beauty queen tried to free herself from family duties; an accountant's tryst turned deadly; and a valedictorian made sure her man coudn't leave.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: For some women, having a sister means nothing more than having a meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant, which can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: From the womb, the Cormier twins are partners in mischief. But as they get older, their innocent antics devolve into a much darker game. Soon, the battle for reality and fantasy bleeds into real life threatening to tear the twins apart.

programme.title: Evil Twins: All-American Killers
programme.desc: Identical twins Roman and Ruslan Glukhoy are high school wrestling champions with a bright future in professional sports. But when a freak accident shatters their dreams, they follow a path to death and destruction with blood on their hands.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Bye Bye Baby
programme.desc: Deep-seated envy between two pregnant sisters leads to a twisted murder plot in an unsuspecting Midwestern town. This unspeakable crime leaves the Merrifield family destroyed forever.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Warriors on the Frontlines
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, Drew Dix and a small handful of soldiers liberate an entire city from an enemy battalion. Russian soldier Viktor Leonov vanquishes German forces in the Arctic battlegrounds of World War 2.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Soaring to New Heights
programme.desc: Test pilot Joe Kittinger volunteers to be the first man to parachute jump from the edge of space, and Air Force researcher Dr. John Stapp straps himself into rocket sleds to test the limits of human endurance.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: Battling the Elements
programme.desc: Firefighter Jack Pritchard fearlessly charges into blazing infernos to rescue victims, and when Hurricane Katrina pounded New Orleans, John Keller stepped up to save residents of his apartment building.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark
programme.desc: The lawless territory of 1880's Montana remains up for grabs. Two relentless American Titans, William Clark and Marcus Daly, find themselves in a war to control power over the state and to mine millions in copper ore hidden in the 'richest hill on earth.'

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: They say everything's bigger in Texas, and the pools are no exception. The Pool Kings are facing a big backyard and even bigger expectations from their interior design client.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pools and Greens Make Happy Teens
programme.desc: A couple wants to keep their two golf-obsessed teenage sons and their friends busy in the yard, and a pool with a putting and chipping green attached is the perfect setup.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ranch Pool Resort
programme.desc: Three generations living together on a family ranch in Austin, Texas, are ready to upgrade their old, outdated pool with a large sun shelf, a spa and a waterfall with jumping rocks.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: After a contractor holds Laura and Greg's new kitchen hostage for four months, even threatening to put a lien on their home, the desperate couple turn to the one contractor they can trust.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Going Big in Galveston, Texas
programme.desc: Mike, Mariellen and their two sons have vacationed in Galveston, Texas, for years, and now they're ready to buy a beach home of their own. Broker Barbara Zimmerman is here to help them find a house with a boat lift for fisherman Mike.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat and Mandarins
programme.desc: Noah gets hot for the smokin' okra burger at the Eastern Carolina Agricultural Fair in Florence, SC. Then he launches into atomic habanero tots and 'The Big Yum' at the Mountain Mandarin Festival in Auburn, CA.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feats Of Meat
programme.desc: Chefs share the most mouth-watering meat dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.desc: We visit some of the eateries that satisfy the sweet cravings of Washington, D.C.'s power brokers, including Golden Brown Delicious and Cupcakes Actually.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cool Cookie Sandwiches

programme.title: Unique Sweets: European Sweets

programme.title: Tom & Jerry

programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.desc: While in New Zealand, the pugs try to return a large egg before it hatches. When Chloe and Keia lose a special canoe paddle, the pups embark on a wilderness adventure to find it.

programme.desc: Chef visits the playroom with some not-so tasty meatballs; When Beaker joins Muppet Rocksplosion, Bunsen sabotages their concert...with science!

programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: SEC Storied: In Search of Derrick Thomas
programme.desc: Derrick Thomas was a legendary college pass rusher and talented linebacker in the NFL before an accident at 33 years old took his life. See how his legacy continues to influence the world years later.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Croom
programme.desc: Coach Sylvester Croom has overcome significant obstacles to impact many lives.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Wuerfell's Way
programme.desc: Former Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel deals with the fallout from Hurricane Katrina's devastation and dedicates himself to charitable outreach in the years following the disaster.

programme.title: SEC Storied: It's Time
programme.desc: On October 28, 1989, defensive back Chucky Mullins hit running back Brad Gaines and, in the process, broke his own neck. Look at the friendship between these players after Mullins was left as a quadriplegic following the tragic incident.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Believer
programme.desc: This profile of Steve Spurrier looks at his close ties to the SEC as a young fan, a Heisman Trophy winning quarterback and an accomplished coach.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Tigers United
programme.desc: When Michael Sam announced on February 9, 2014 that he was gay, he became football's first openly gay active player. For most, the revelation was a surprise. For his teammates, it was not news. Michael had found acceptance in the Tigers football family.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Miracles on the Plains
programme.desc: Look back at the 2013 Auburn football season and their remarkable turnaround from the lowest of lows to a national championship game.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Play That Changed College Football
programme.desc: Look at the inaugural SEC championship game in 1992 and the impact it's had on college football.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Herschel Walker
programme.desc: Herschel Walker's career in the SEC was legendary, but his journey off the field was filled with struggle, pain, and ultimately, redemption.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Book of Manning
programme.desc: Written into the pages of football folklore is the Manning legend, a story started by patriarch, Archie, with chapters featuring his sons, Cooper, Peyton and Eli. Director Rory Karpf explores how a tragedy shaped the course of their lives.

programme.desc: Examine the details of the abduction and murder of black children from 1979-1981.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Westworld: The Mother of Exiles
programme.desc: A dark odyssey about the dawn of artificial consciousness and the evolution of sin.

programme.title: Movie: Prisoners
programme.desc: A father kidnaps the main suspect when his young daughter and her friend go missing, while the lead detective races against the clock to unravel the case before it's too late. They soon discover that all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Movie: War Dogs
programme.desc: During the Iraq War, two friends in their early 20s bid on U.S. Military contracts to get rich, and win a $300-million deal to arm the Afghan Military. The new deal puts them in business with dangerous and shady characters.

programme.title: Movie: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Country music superstar Jackson Maine thinks that he's found the solution to his drinking problem when he finds happiness with an up-and-coming young singer-songwriter, but when her career begins to eclipse his he falls back into his old habits.

programme.title: Every Brilliant Thing
programme.desc: One-man show about depression, suicide and the lengths to which people go for loved ones.

programme.title: Movie: Becoming Jane
programme.desc: The story of pre-fame Jane Austen and her desire to give up money and social status to marry for love. She meets a young Irish rogue, falls head over heels in love, and risks losing everything that matters to her and her family.

programme.title: Movie: Jobs
programme.desc: Explores the life and career of college dropout and creative entrepreneur, Steve Jobs.

programme.title: Ice on Fire
programme.desc: Explore the effects of climate changes and the efforts to reduce carbon inputs to the environment. Filmed across the globe, the film highlights firsthand accounts of people at the forefront of the climate crisis, including scientists, farmers and others.

programme.title: Movie: Proof
programme.desc: The daughter of an unstable math genius must come to terms with the chaos of her life.

programme.title: Movie: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Ray, a working father of two, struggles to save his family when aliens invade Earth with the aim of destroying it. Ray comes to the defence of his children as the world deals with a force it has never known.

programme.title: Movie: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: This documentary examines the rising phenomenon of 'fake news. in the U.S. and the impact that disinformation, conspiracy theories and false news stories have on the average citizen.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: Movie: Blinded by the Light
programme.desc: A teenager learns to live his life and find his voice through the music of Bruce Springsteen.

programme.title: The Plot Against America
programme.desc: Evelyn makes Sandy the face of the 'Just Folks' program, despite Bess' and Herman's objections. A war casualty, Alvin takes a menial job and tries to regroup.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Soup
programme.desc: When a snowstorm hits on Christmas eve, Pam-Anne joins her sister Destiny and a motley crew of flight attendants at their usual crash pad in Queens. The Guy celebrates Hanukkah in New York.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday
programme.desc: A man realizes he is the last person on Earth who remembers the Beatles.

programme.title: Movie: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: This documentary examines the rising phenomenon of 'fake news. in the U.S. and the impact that disinformation, conspiracy theories and false news stories have on the average citizen.

programme.title: Movie: American Animals

programme.title: HBO First Look: Antlers
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at film productions.

programme.title: Movie: Hall Pass
programme.desc: Two best friends are granted permission by their wives to have extramarital affairs, but when their wives join in on the fun things get a little out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Holland's Opus
programme.desc: A musician takes a teaching job and finds his true calling in inspiring young minds.

programme.title: The Making of: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: Glass

programme.title: Movie: Heart and Souls
programme.desc: A man is possessed by four souls who instruct him to continue their unfinished business.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Raising Arizona
programme.desc: An eccentric, childless couple decide to kidnap one baby from a set of quintuplets.

programme.title: Movie: Housesitter
programme.desc: An architect meets a habitual liar, who poses as his wife and moves into his dream house.

programme.title: Movie: Phat Girlz
programme.desc: A plus-size woman struggles to find love and acceptance as she pursues a career as a fashion designer.

programme.title: Movie: Judy Moody and the Not Bummer Summer

programme.title: Flight of the Conchords: Mugged

programme.title: Flight of the Conchords: Sally
programme.desc: The guys move their band to New York City in hopes of finding gigs and hot new women.

programme.title: Movie: Johnny English Strikes Again

programme.title: Movie: Muriel's Wedding
programme.desc: A socially inept young woman with a dysfunctional family yearns for a better life.

programme.title: Movie: Forget Paris
programme.desc: The story of a romance between an NBA referee and an American woman living in Paris.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday
programme.desc: A man realizes he is the last person on Earth who remembers the Beatles.

programme.title: Movie: Chocolat
programme.desc: A mother and daughter open a chocolate shop in a small conservative French village.
